prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "1A. Risk Factors" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 1C. Cybersecurity".
First locate the bottom edge of Item 1A's text:
- If the "Item 1C" heading is visible on this page, Item 1A ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Otherwise Item 1A runs all the way to the very bottom of the page.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 1A at that bottom edge — the FINAL lines right before the section ends, NOT lines from the top or middle of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
Our business is subject to various laws and regulations, and we may be required to make significant changes to our business practices to comply with them.
Failure to comply with these laws and regulations could result in significant fines, penalties, and other legal actions.
We may also be subject to lawsuits from customers, employees, and other third parties.
These factors could adversely affect our business, financial condition, and results of operations.
Our business is also subject to risks related to cybersecurity.
